# Shared-file drift allow-list  (a11oy <-> killinchu)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read by .github/shared-file-drift-check.py. One path per line; text after a
# `#` is ignored, so each path may carry an inline reason. KEEP THIS FILE
# IDENTICAL IN BOTH REPOS.
#
# A path here is a file that BOTH repos ship and that the guard would otherwise
# require to be byte-identical, but which is *currently* allowed to differ. The
# guard is a ratchet:
#   * Files NOT listed here must stay byte-identical across the two repos, or the
#     build FAILS (this blocks NEW drift).
#   * Files listed here are reported but do not fail the build.
#   * When a listed file becomes identical again, the guard WARNS so this entry
#     can be removed — tightening the ratchet over time.
#
# To accept a deliberate divergence: add the path with a short reason.
# To reconcile a divergence: sync the file in both repos, then delete its line.
#
# Seeded 2026-06-08 with the drift that existed when the guard was added.
# 2026-06-09 reconciliation pass: szl_rag.py and szl_khipu_lmdb.py were synced to
# a single canonical copy in BOTH repos and removed from this list. The remaining
# entries are GENUINE, intentional app-specific divergences (one-line reason each)
# kept on purpose — the two demos are NOT meant to be byte-identical here, so they
# are documented rather than force-synced.

# 2026-06-14 reconciliation pass (frontier shared-drift fix): a11oy_code_engine.py
#   (a11oy canonical 353c8017 locked-5->8) and szl_provenance.py (killinchu canonical
#   deae62de additive Rekor/cited-proofs) were synced to a single byte-identical copy in
#   BOTH repos and removed from this list. szl_dsse.py rotated cosign key (a11oy d13df64c)
#   synced killinchu->canonical; it was never allow-listed (enforced identical).

# --- App-specific feature sets: each demo ships features the other does not.

# 2026-06-30 reconciliation pass (CI sweep Dev C): removed 7 stale-allow entries
#   that are now byte-identical: szl_alloy_models.py, szl_llm_registry.py,
#   operator_shell_v4.py, live_wires_3d.js, szl_khipu_consensus.py,
#   szl_energy_sovereign.py, szl_live_wires.py, live_wires.html. Tightening ratchet.
szl_evidence_research.py   # killinchu-only finance/real-estate/risk vertical CLAIMS (PR #115) absent from a11oy's organ console

# --- Doctrine / honesty-claim state that differs per demo.
# 2026-06-10: szl_brain.py and szl_formulas.py were union-merged to a single
#   canonical byte-identical copy in BOTH repos tonight, so they are removed from
#   this list to tighten the ratchet (they are now ENFORCED identical).

# --- Vendored binary-asset blob bundle: each demo vendors a different set of
#     fonts / 3D / chart assets as base64 blobs, so this file legitimately
#     differs (a11oy ~1.52MB vs killinchu ~1.30MB). NOT a shared logic module.
_vendor_blobs.py           # per-app vendored asset blob bundle (different asset sets)

# --- 2026-06-14: killinchu QA5 demo-floor rate-limit fix. killinchu exempts
#     its own page/static routes (/elite, /maritime, /globe, /jackin, ...) from
#     the per-IP limiter so the showcase always renders; a11oy serves different
#     routes, so this hardening module is intentionally app-specific. Reconcile
#     only if both demos ever adopt one shared limiter.
szl_be_hardening.py        # killinchu QA5 page/static rate-limit exemptions (app-specific routes)

# --- 2026-06-30: elegant-dark-landing fix rebrands user-visible CHASKI → a11oy Code
#     in the operator widget. killinchu's copy needs the same update (reconcile in
#     killinchu PR). Allow temporarily until killinchu widget is synced.
static-vendor/a11oy-operator-widget.js  # CHASKI→a11oy Code rebrand; killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-01: a11oy-specific agent-loop feature set. a11oy folds the Wallpa
#     VOICE organ into FINALIZE (PR #597) and adds EXPERIMENTAL Banach + active-flux
#     routing pre-steps (PR #600, advisory-only, Λ = Conjecture 1, locked-8 untouched).
#     These ~142 lines are absent from killinchu's copy, so the file legitimately
#     diverges. Additive; in-repo SHA lock (.shared_module_hashes.json) pins a11oy's
#     canonical copy. Reconcile if killinchu ever adopts the VOICE organ.
a11oy_agent_loop.py        # a11oy VOICE-organ FINALIZE fold-in + EXPERIMENTAL routing; killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-01: a11oy sovereign-router primary. a11oy's code engine prefers the
#     self-hosted A11OY_BRAIN_URL (then A11OY_MODEL_BASE_URL, then HF_ROUTER_BASE)
#     for model routing (PR #604). Security screening (_static_screen / _sandbox_exec)
#     is byte-unchanged; only the model-base-URL env preference differs from killinchu.
#     Additive. Reconcile if killinchu adopts the same sovereign-router default.
a11oy_code_engine.py       # a11oy A11OY_BRAIN_URL sovereign-router preference; killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-01: a11oy unified-receipt fields. a11oy's governed agentic loop
#     additively folds energy attestation (MEASURED|UNAVAILABLE, never a fabricated
#     joule) and an OPTIONAL Khipu 3-of-4 multi-witness link (default OFF, env
#     A11OY_MULTIWITNESS=1) into the same signed hash chain (PR #607). Default path
#     is byte-identical behaviour to today; prev-hash linkage unchanged. These lines
#     are absent from killinchu's copy, so the file legitimately diverges. Additive;
#     Λ = Conjecture 1 (advisory), locked-8 untouched. Reconcile if killinchu adopts
#     the unified receipt.
# 2026-07-01 (cognitive-runtime wave): a11oy additively folds governed-reasoning
#     steps reimplemented from platform's cognitive-runtime PATTERN — a lexical DRIFT
#     guard (A11OY_DRIFT_GUARD=1) and a COUNTERFACTUAL check (A11OY_COUNTERFACTUAL=1,
#     "what would make this wrong?" via a wired reasoning brain; honest {ran:false}
#     with no brain). ALL default OFF, so the default 6-hop chain stays byte-identical.
#     Advisory only; they never alter the gate/kernel verdict; locked-8 untouched.
#     Deepens the existing a11oy-only divergence.
# 2026-07-01 (cognitive-runtime wave, cont.): a11oy additively folds a durable HUMAN-
#     APPROVAL-INTERRUPT primitive (A11OY_APPROVAL_INTERRUPT=1) — a gate-ALLOWED state-
#     changing action is HELD at a durable checkpoint (checkpoint_id over action identity,
#     not run) until a matching human grant releases it; solves tool-call-committed-before-yes.
#     Composes with — never overrides — the gate (a DENY stays DENY; injected input cannot
#     flip a DENY to a fire). Default OFF, so the default 6-hop chain stays byte-identical.
#     Advisory-composed; locked-8 untouched. Deepens the existing a11oy-only divergence.
szl_agentic_loop.py        # a11oy unified-receipt + cognitive DRIFT/COUNTERFACTUAL/APPROVAL-INTERRUPT steps (default OFF) fold-in; killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-03: a11oy corrected szl_joules_truth.FRESHNESS_WINDOW_S from a
#     non-canonical 120.0 to the CANONICAL 30s value shared by szl_energy_operator
#     (MAX_NVML_AGE_S=30.0), joule_billing (MAX_NVML_AGE_S=30), and the published
#     kernel szl-energy-attest/energy_core (FRESHNESS_WINDOW_S=30.0). The old 120s
#     let a 31-120s NVML reading read MEASURED here while billing/operator/kernel
#     treated it as SAMPLE — an internal honesty inconsistency (PR #672). killinchu's
#     copy still carries the old window; reconcile by applying the same 30s value in
#     killinchu, then remove this entry.
szl_joules_truth.py        # a11oy FRESHNESS_WINDOW_S 120.0->canonical 30s honesty fix (PR #672); killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-03: a11oy honesty fix (FIX 4) — szl_rag.py had a dead
#     register_rag_routes()/render_rag_html() surface that was never mounted
#     (a11oy_org_rag.py is the ONE live RAG engine). a11oy drops the dead
#     mount and marks the module library-only so there is a single RAG surface.
#     killinchu's copy still carries the old register_rag_routes; reconcile by
#     applying the same drop in killinchu, then remove this entry.
szl_rag.py                 # a11oy library-only + dead register_rag_routes drop (FIX 4); killinchu sync pending

# --- 2026-07-03: a11oy federates its genuinely-live standalone sibling Spaces.
#     a11oy additively adds immune-standalone (/healthz=200) and yarqa
#     (/healthz=200) to szl_v4_fleet.PEER_HEALTH_URLS so its fleet/peer-health
#     view probes them for real, and adds an explicit honest `up` boolean to
#     _probe_peer (True ONLY on a real 200, never fabricated). These siblings are
#     a11oy's fleet peers, not killinchu's, so the file legitimately diverges.
#     Additive; locked-8 @ c7c0ba17 untouched; Λ = Conjecture 1. Reconcile if
#     killinchu ever federates the same siblings.
szl_v4_fleet.py            # a11oy immune-standalone/yarqa peer-health federation + honest up field; killinchu sync pending
